entries.name: Corporate Bulk Buy
entries.description: A cheerful procurement specialist has decided morale can be purchased in volume, preferably with a company card and zero follow-up questions.
entries.notification_text: Corporate Bulk Buy! A buyer just dropped a large order worth $%.0f!
entries.toast_message: A corporate buyer just placed a massive bulk order!

entries.name: Price War Erupts
entries.description: Two bargain zealots in the next wing keep undercutting each other with increasingly desperate neon poster copy, and shoppers now expect miracles for pocket change.
entries.notification_text: Price War! Nearby stores are slashing prices. Demand dips for %d days.
entries.resolution_text: The price war burned itself out. Normal spending expectations resume.
entries.toast_message: A price war has broken out nearby. Shoppers are getting stingy.
